modelIdentification.name: JLVC-Enumerations
modelIdentification.purpose: JLVC-Enumerations provides additional enumerations required for the JLVC Federation that do not exist in RPR3 or SISO REF 010.
modelIdentification.description: This FOM module extends existing RPR3 enumerated datatypes with additional JLVC enumerations.
modelIdentification.useHistory: JLVC2025 - Initial draft of JLVC-Enumerations module. Extended CountryEnum16 from RPR-Enumerations with additional country codes that are not in RPR3 or SISO REF 010. Extended EmitterNameEnum16 from RPR-Enumerations with additional placeholder emitter enumerations 50000-59999 to support exercise emitters that are not in RPR3 or SISO REF 010.
JLVC2026 - Version 2: Updated reference dependencies to use the new RPRv3 module names.
JLVC2026 - Version 3: Removed the JLVC extension of the RPR v3.0 CountryEnum16 data type due to the inclusion of JLVC Generic Lifeform countries in SISO REF 010 v36.

reference.identification: SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Enumerations FOM Module
SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Foundation FOM Module

enumeratedData.name: EmitterNameEnum16
enumeratedData.semantics: Extends RPR3 EmitterNameEnum16 datatype with additional placeholder emitter enumerations in order to support exercise emitters that are not in RPR3 or SISO REF 010.
